steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content: Notice that $16x+8 = 4(4x+2)$. The target expression is exactly 4 times the given equation.

steps.title: Substitute and compute
steps.content:
Since $4x+2=12$, substitute into the factored form:
$$16x+8 = 4(4x+2) = 4 \cdot 12 = 48$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
